channel.title: Enterprise AI on Abdul HaQ
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise AI on Abdul HaQ

item.title: Enterprise Entity Linking: Lessons from JPMorgan's JEL System
item.description: Insights from JPMorgan’s JEL system on how entity linking works in complex enterprise environments.

item.title: Why Scaling Matters — Even When You're Building for 10 Users
item.description: Moving beyond simple LLM-as-a-Judge patterns to multi-agent, tool-augmented evaluation loops that ensure factual precision in high-stakes domains like healthcare.
